queries.question: List the project and construction managers and their responsible projects.
queries.sql: Select Projects.Project_Manager, Construction_Manager, Projects.ProjectName From Projects
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_manager ?construction_manager ?projectname WHERE {
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:Project_Manager ?project_manager .
  ?projects p:Construction_Manager ?construction_manager .
  ?projects p:name ?projectname .
}

queries.question: Which project manager and construction manager has the highest budget?
queries.sql: Select Projects.Project_Manager, Construction_Manager, Projects.Budget  From Projects ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_manager ?construction_manager ?budget WHERE {
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:Project_Manager ?project_manager .
  ?projects p:Construction_Manager ?construction_manager .
  ?projects p:budget ?budget .
  ?projects p:budget ?budget_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?budget_o)
LIMIT 1
